Haunted ATX

Choose Your Tour

Five ways to experience Austin's dark side — the best Austin ghost tours, on wheels. Pick your ride.

Public · Best Value

Public Van Tour

Air-conditioned, art-wrapped van with more seats — same haunted history.

$49 / person
Duration
~3 hrs
Capacity
Up to 10
Type
Public
  • BYOB — water & sodas provided
  • Clay Pit 2-for-1 coupon included
  • Tue–Sun, 7:30 PM
Book Now Learn More
Public · Classic Experience

Public Hearse Tour

Ride Austin's haunted streets in a classic Cadillac hearse limo.

$99 / person
Duration
~3 hrs
Capacity
Up to 6
Type
Public
  • BYOB — water & sodas provided
  • Clay Pit 2-for-1 coupon included
  • Tue–Sun, 7:00 PM
Book Now Learn More
Private · Your Group Only

Private Hearse Tour

The whole hearse reserved for your group — custom pickup anywhere downtown.

From $125 / person
First 2 at $125 · Additional at $79
Duration
~3 hrs
Capacity
Up to 6
Type
Private
  • Entire hearse reserved for your group
  • Custom pickup & drop-off downtown
  • Tue–Sun, 8:00 PM
Book Now Learn More
Public · Hands-On

Paranormal Investigation

Go hands-on with spirits at The Clay Pit's historic Bertram Building.

$59 / person
Duration
~2 hrs
Capacity
Up to 10
Type
Public
  • Pro equipment provided (Spirit Box, EMF & more)
  • Historic Bertram Building (est. 1850s)
  • Saturdays, 10:30 PM
Book Now Learn More
Private · Your Group Only

Private Paranormal Investigation

The full investigation experience — no strangers, just your group and the spirits.

From $125 / person
First 2 at $125 · Additional at $79
Duration
~2 hrs
Capacity
Min. 2
Type
Private
  • Exclusive to your group — no shared space
  • Professional equipment provided
  • Fridays, 10:30 PM
